composition.composition_rule: 격자 구조 및 삼분할 법칙 (Grid and Rule of Thirds)

texture.detail_rendering: 경광(Hard Light)을 활용하여 오렌지, 코스터, 타일의 질감 대비를 극대화함

mood.tone: 모던, 미니멀, 그래픽, 볼드 (Modern, Minimal, Graphic, Bold)

improvement_notes: 경광을 연광으로 바꾸고 반사판으로 그림자를 채워 부드럽고 고급스러운 느낌을 줄 수 있음. 화이트밸런스를 살짝 따뜻하게 조정하고, 작은 소품을 추가하여 스토리를 더할 수 있음.
nano_banana_prompt: A minimalist top-down flat lay food photography of [FOOD ITEM]. The scene is illuminated by intense, direct natural sunlight from a high side angle, casting a single, sharp, and deep dark shadow. The background is a clean, bright white tiled surface. The overall style is graphic and high-contrast, with the food's colors being vibrant and saturated while the background remains neutral. Emphasize the glistening, hyper-detailed texture of the food. The image should have a subtle film grain, reminiscent of Kodak Ektar 100 film. --ar 2:3
